name: @anionzo/skill
description: Personal AI Skill Library — vendor-neutral, multi-agent skill library for AI-powered software engineering

scripts.postinstall:
echo "
🧠 @anionzo/skill installed successfully!

📁 Skills:     node_modules/@anionzo/skill/skills/
📚 Knowledge:  node_modules/@anionzo/skill/knowledge/
📄 Docs:       node_modules/@anionzo/skill/docs/
🌐 i18n:       node_modules/@anionzo/skill/i18n/

🔌 To use: copy generated/ output to your project
   bash node_modules/@anionzo/skill/scripts/sync-platform-files
"

author: Mai Trung Tiến
